title: ranunculus piliger
intro: Ranunculus piliger, also known as Ranunculus californicus or California buttercup, is a plant species that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) and is native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Ranunculus piliger is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and promoting tissue repair, and has been used in herbal preparations to treat conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, salve, or poultice, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
